institution.name: SUNY College of Agriculture and Technology at Cobleskill

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at SUNY College of Agriculture and Technology at Cobleskill fell 19% between 2006 and 2009 (35.7% → 28.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at SUNY College of Agriculture and Technology at Cobleskill fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at SUNY College of Agriculture and Technology at Cobleskill rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (59.7% → 68.7%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at SUNY College of Agriculture and Technology at Cobleskill rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (40.9% → 45.7%).
